title: Product of Array Except Self
hints: Notice that the product for index i consists of everything to its left multiplied by everything to its right.
Compute prefix products from the start and suffix products from the end, then combine them for each position.

You don't need two separate arrays. Fill the result with running left-side products in one forward pass, then sweep backward, multiplying each entry by a right-side product you accumulate on the fly. A single extra variable carries that suffix product.
